title: Arena Rock Anthem
summary: 120 BPM 70s stadium rock - crunchy power chords, soaring guitar lead, fist-pump drums.
prompt: A triumphant 70s arena rock instrumental at 120 BPM. Crunchy distorted power chords on a Les Paul, soaring melodic guitar lead with bend-and-vibrato, fist-pump drum pattern with open hi-hat, driving bassline, hand-clap on the chorus. Stadium-anthem energy - Queen / Boston / Foreigner influences. Big and triumphant.
